content: Tauri 2 updater: tauri-plugin-updater (Rust, 2.10.1) + @tauri-apps/plugin-updater (JS, 2.10.1), verified 2026-06-26. Requires bundle.createUpdaterArtifacts=true, pubkey set in plugins.updater.pubkey (inlined, not a path), endpoints array (TLS enforced in prod). Sign with 'tauri signer generate' producing a keypair; private key in TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY env (NOT .env). @tauri-apps/plugin-process (relaunch) pairs with it. Produces .app.tar.gz.sig (macOS), .AppImage.sig (Linux), .exe/.msi.sig (Windows). Supports static JSON manifest (GitHub Releases via tauri-action) or dynamic server; custom target like 'macos-universal'. Windows installMode passive/basicUi/quiet. This satisfies v2.0 full-notarization + auto-updater requirement.
